title: Malachite (Fabric)
description: a weapon mod based around crystals and electricty
body:
originally made to be used with enchancements

Heavily imspired by [Amarite](https://modrinth.com/mod/amarite)

**Getting Started:**
getting malachite is pretty easy, sneak right click on an oxidized copper block with an echo shard to create budding malachite which will grow malachite clusters from its top. when fully grown these clusters will drop a malachite

**Malachite Longsword:**
the main weapon of this mod, relatively slow but has extra reach and damage. when holding right click with it you can block attacks, reducing damage you take from them and charging up your weapon after each block. if you left click while blocking and the weapon is fully charged you will fire a beam that deals armor piercing damage and applies a new effect called overcharged.
> **Shockwave** is a new enchantment for the longsword, it replaces the beam with a shockwave that launches nearby entites back and applies overcharged.

**Malachite Dagger:**
a fast and weak weapon that can be thrown and charges on hit, if you hit someone while it's charged they will be launched away from you and get overcharged.

**Malachite Pylon:**
a new block, if someone is hit while near it thd pylon charges up by one stage, when fully charged you can right click it with a malachite weapon to charge it, or you can give it a redstone pulse to make it cause a shockwave knocking anyone near it back.

**Overcharged (W.I.P):**
a new effect added by this mod, currently makes you take a bit of extra damage every time you take damage.

**Seraphite:**
a new building block made with malachite snd stole has a polished, brick and chiseled varient.
